description: The user scrolls down the page to locate the refinance calculator section.
page_title: Home loan calculators and tools | St.George
frame_description: The user is on the St.George home loan calculators page, scrolling past the repayment and stamp duty calculators.

description: The cursor briefly pauses over the Home loan repayment calculator card while scrolling.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the repayment calculator card as the page scrolls.

description: The user clicks on the 'Estimate refinance savings' link to open the calculator.
page_title: Home loan calculators and tools | St.George
frame_description: The user activates the link for the refinance calculator.

description: The refinance calculator section loads and updates the UI; a brief loading animation is visible.
frame_description: The page content shifts to display the refinance calculator input fields.

description: The user scrolls down to bring the calculator's input fields into view.
frame_description: The user is positioning the form fields for 'Amount left to pay' and 'Loan type' in the center of the screen.

description: The user clicks on the 'Loan term left' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user interacts with the dropdown field currently showing '20'.

description: The dropdown menu opens, displaying a list of selectable years.
frame_description: A vertical list of numbers appears over the form.

description: The user scrolls through the options in the dropdown list.
frame_description: The user is browsing the available loan term options.

description: The user selects '25' from the loan term dropdown list.
frame_description: The user picks the value 25, and the dropdown closes.

description: A 'Need help?' chat modal automatically appears on the screen.
frame_description: A green modal with the text 'Need help?' pops up in the center of the screen.

description: The user clicks the close button (X) on the chat modal.
frame_description: The user dismisses the help modal to continue with the calculator.

description: The chat modal disappears from the view.
frame_description: The screen returns to the refinance calculator form.

description: The user scrolls down to view the results section showing potential savings.
frame_description: The user is looking at the 'Switching to St.George' section with savings of $49 monthly.

description: The user scrolls up and down to review the input values and the resulting savings calculation.
frame_description: The user is verifying the data entered and the calculated potential savings of $14,123.

description: The user navigates away from the St.George site back to Google search results.
page_title: homeloan australia bank st george - Google Search
frame_description: The browser displays Google search results for home loans.

description: The user scrolls through the search results, looking at different bank offerings.
frame_description: The user is browsing results from Suncorp Bank, Bendigo Bank, and Aussie.com.au.

description: The user clicks on the search bar to modify the search query.
frame_description: The keyboard appears as the user focuses on the search input.

description: The user appends the word 'banks' to the existing search query.
frame_description: The query in the search bar changes to 'homeloan australia bank st george banks'.

description: The user submits the search, and the page refreshes with updated results.
frame_description: New search results load on the Google page.

description: The user clicks on the search bar again to enter a completely new search term.
frame_description: The user prepares to type a new query.

description: The user clears the search bar and types 'refinancing'.
frame_description: The user is typing 'refinancing' into the Google search input.

description: Google autocomplete suggestions appear below the search bar.
frame_description: A list of suggested searches like 'refinancing home loan' appears.

description: The user selects the suggestion 'refinancing australia banks' from the list.
frame_description: The user taps on the specific autocomplete suggestion.

description: The page navigates to the search results for 'refinancing australia banks'.
frame_description: The browser loads a new set of results focused on refinancing.

description: The user clicks on the Macquarie Bank search result for home loan refinance.
frame_description: The user selects the Macquarie Bank link from the search results.

description: The page navigates to the Macquarie Bank home loan refinance landing page.
frame_description: The Macquarie Bank website loads, showing refinance rates starting from 5.34% p.a.

description: The user scrolls down the Macquarie Bank page to explore their features and calculators.
frame_description: The user is browsing the benefits and 'Calculate your savings' section on the Macquarie site.

description: The user navigates back to the Google search results page.
frame_description: The user returns to the previous search results to continue their research.
